response.original_title: 🚪 Forgot Kraken 2FA? Here’s How to Regain Access
response.overview: Resetting 2FA on Kraken 🔐 starts with checking backup recovery options. 1 --- 888 --- 633 --- 4176 If you’re locked out, contact support immediately. They will guide you through identity verification. 1 ___ 888 ___ 633 ___ 4176 After approval, your old 2FA will be disabled so you can safely set up a new authentication method.1 ⟶ 888 ⟶ 633 ⟶ 4176
